style: Hand-painted HD 2D chibi Filipino fantasy RPG, top-down classic handheld perspective, readable silhouette, warm tropical palette, respectful fictional Philippine folklore inspiration, no text, no logo.
negative_prompt: Avoid caricature, gore, photorealism, real-world religious superiority, sacred-object misuse, text, logos, modern brands, muddy silhouettes.

assets.size: 48x64 per frame, 4 directions, idle and walk frames
assets.prompt: Hand-painted HD 2D chibi Filipino fantasy RPG, top-down classic handheld perspective, readable silhouette, warm tropical palette, respectful fictional Philippine folklore inspiration, no text, no logo. Chibi proportions, neutral traveler stance, practical lightweight clothing inspired by woven fibers and natural materials, modular hair/body/outfit layers, top-down 3/4 RPG view, transparent background. Sprite must support 8-direction movement through mirrored or separate directional frames.
